seo.defaultTitle: Midao — Hidden Taiwan, by those who know
seo.defaultDescription: Book real local guides and the routes no guidebook tells you. Discover hidden Taiwan, book directly, pay securely.

hero.photoAlt: Looking up at a canyon from inside a cave, dawn light pouring over the valley and stream
hero.sub: Local guides × Deep routes × Real encounters
hero.caption: TAIWAN. LOCAL GUIDE. REAL STORIES.

guide.label: Local guide · In-depth travel
guide.name: Chaishan, Kaohsiung ·
guide.quoteB: someone who knows the way takes you into Chaishan.”
guide.portraitAlt: Andy Lee, a local guide of Chaishan in Kaohsiung, with his hawk in the forest

items.q: Why is this way of traveling worth it?
items.a: Choose with clarity, not by luck — guide profiles, reviews and specialties are laid out so you pick the right person in minutes. Travel into memories, not a rushed itinerary — you see who a trip suits and what you'll remember, not just the spots. With a local leading the way, you waste less time — a guide who knows the area helps you avoid traps and stick to reliable routes.

items.q: What is a private guided tour?
items.a: A private guided tour is a small-group experience led by a platform-verified local guide. The guide designs the itinerary, and travelers explore at their own pace without following a big-group schedule.

items.q: How do you ensure guide quality and safety?
items.a: Every guide is identity-verified (KYC); some also hold first-aid certification, environmental-education credentials and other professional qualifications. The platform also offers an emergency hotline with a 30-minute response.
All payments are encrypted via ECPay or LINE Pay — your credit card details never pass through this site.
Yes. Every tour has a clear refund policy. Most tours are fully refundable up to 168 hours before departure, and 70% refundable between 72 and 168 hours before. See each tour page for details.
It depends on the tour. Every tour page notes who it suits and who it may not suit — please check before booking. Some tours have a family-friendly tag.

items.q: How do I become a guide?
items.a: Click “Become a Guide” and fill out the application. Once reviewed by the platform, you can list your tours. We welcome guides with local character and professional backgrounds.

closing.title: Your Midao story starts here
closing.desc: Let a local take you deep into Taiwan and meet the real beauty of it.

kaohsiung-chaishan-cave-experience.title: Chaishan Caves · Urban Hidden Gem
kaohsiung-chaishan-cave-experience.subtitle: Step into a landscape secret at the city's edge
kaohsiung-chaishan-cave-experience.desc:
Follow someone who knows the way into the coral-reef cave landscape,
and meet another world of Kaohsiung at the city's edge.

hualien-river-trekking.title: Xiuguluan River · Trekking Adventure
hualien-river-trekking.subtitle: Into Taiwan's purest wild streams
hualien-river-trekking.desc:
Leap into pools, drift downstream and climb to the top of a waterfall —
feel the power of Hualien's mountains and water on foot.

dadadaocheng-walk.title: Dadaocheng · A Century-Old District
dadadaocheng-walk.subtitle: Truly get to know a street that has lived a hundred years
dadadaocheng-walk.desc:
From the Dihua Street fabric shops and the City God Temple to Yongle Market,
walk the people and history behind the district into a story.

taipei-night-market-food-tour.title: Taipei Night Market · Street Eats
taipei-night-market-food-tour.subtitle: Not just eating — understanding why it's good
taipei-night-market-food-tour.desc:
Follow a local foodie into the alley stalls,
and read Taipei's night one bite at a time.

available.title: Available
available.body: This time slot is currently available to book.

full.title: Fully booked
full.body: This time slot is full. Please choose another time or date.

closed.title: Closed
closed.body: This slot was closed by the guide or an administrator. Please choose another time.

blackout.title: Guide unavailable
blackout.body: The guide marked this slot as unavailable. Please choose another time or date.

inactive_plan.title: Plan inactive
inactive_plan.body: This plan is currently inactive and cannot be booked. Please pick a plan again from the activity page.

outside_rule.title: Outside booking hours
outside_rule.body: The guide has not opened this slot for booking. Please choose another time.

outside_season.title: Out of season
outside_season.body: This plan is outside its open season. Please choose another date.

blocked_by_conflict.title: Time conflict
blocked_by_conflict.body: This slot conflicts with an existing booking and is unavailable by default.

allowed_with_admin_override.title: Admin override
allowed_with_admin_override.body: This slot conflicts with an existing booking but was opened by an administrator. Please confirm the arrangement.

fallback.title: Unavailable
fallback.body: This slot is currently unavailable. Please try again later or contact support.
